sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (id INT, long_vals LONG[], float_vals FLOAT[], double_vals DOUBLE[]);
INSERT INTO test_array (id, long_vals, float_vals, double_vals) VALUES (1, lvector(5, 10, 15), fvector(1.1, 2.2, 3.3), dvector(4.4, 5.5, 6.6));
UPDATE test_array SET float_vals = fvector(4.1, 5.2, 6.3) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, long_vals, float_vals FROM test_array WHERE long_vals[1] > 5;
